Now people refer to it as a “super grain” since it offers a healthy balance of essential amino acids. Each of these nicknames is slightly off. Quinoa is actually a seed – not a grain – from a plant related to spinach, beets, and Swiss chard. Call it what you will. We’ll just call it delicious. AMBROSIA® Pieces & Stems Mushrooms are light in color with an earthy flavor. They are made from uniformly sized Champignon mushrooms and are very versatile.

AMBROSIA® Chipolte Peppers are vine-ripened red jalapeno peppers that are smoked and completely dried. Then they are re-hydrated and canned in a sweet and tangy puree of tomatoes, vinegar, garlic and some other spices, for a flavorful sauce.
AMBROSIA® Sliced Pineapple is imported from Thailand, Indonesia and China. Pineapple is a tropical fruit and the climate in Southeast Asia is ideal for growing this deliciously sweet golden fruit. T

AMBROSIA® Chunk Light Tuna, made from skipjack or bonito, has firm texture, darker color and pronounced taste at a competitive price.  It is ideal for institutional use.  It is packed in water with vegetable broth to enhance flavor.

AMBROSIA® Albacore Chunk Tuna is widely known as "white tuna" of the US because it has the lightest flesh (white with a hint of pink) among the tuna species.  It is packed in choice cuts that are smaller compared to the larger pieces of solid albacore. Regarded as the "chicken of the sea," some say that it tastes like chicken meat. This albacore chunk contains vegetable broth to  enhance the flavor of tuna.
AMBROSIA® Giardiniera is an assortment of pickled garden vegetables: white cauliflower, red pepper strips, sliced carrots, celery and pepperoncini peppers packed in a vinegar brine.

AMBROSIA® Farro is an ancient grain from the wheat species that is typically grown in Italy.  It is shaped like rice in brown color and has a distinct nutty taste and chewy texture.  This pearled* grain is high in fiber, protein and potassium  which makes it a convenient healthy choice over other grains.  It is also 100% organic.

description: Gulden's Yellow Mustard is made with a unique bend of mustard seed and spices and delivers the same quality, texture and appearance as the original Gulden's recipe.  Add BOLD flavor to any meal or appetizer with a 12-ounce squeeze bottle of GULDEN'S BOLD Yellow Mustard. Made with #1 grade mustard seeds this yellow mustard is great for dressing homemade burgers and sandwiches or using as a dipping sauce for pretzels and pigs in a blanket. GULDEN'S Mustard comes in a squeeze bottle that makes it easy to get the perfect pour or drizzle every time. Give your favorite foods a delicious classic flare with GULDEN'S BOLD Yellow Mustard and try other GULDEN'S flavors including Stone Ground Dijon Spicy Brown Sriracha and Honey.

A special blend of premium brown and yellow mustard seeds for the hearty flavor your customers want. Available in a variety of sizes and containers for both back-of-the-house and front-of-the-house usage.

Add BOLD flavor to any meal or appetizer with a 12-ounce squeeze bottle of GULDEN'S Stone Ground Dijon Mustard. Made with #1 grade mustard seeds and Chablis Wine for premium taste, this stone ground Dijon mustard is great for dressing homemade burgers and sandwiches or using as a dipping sauce for pretzels and pigs in a blanket. GULDEN'S Mustard comes in a squeeze bottle that makes it easy to get the perfect pour or drizzle every time. Give your favorite foods a delicious kick with GULDEN'S Stone Ground Mustard, and try other GULDEN'S flavors, including Spicy Brown, Sriracha, Honey and BOLD Yellow.

description: Hunt's Tomato Ketchup Portion Control Packets' individually portioned format helps operators provide a convenient, tamper resistant format that is perfect for take-out and delivery applications. This product provides operators with strong front-of-house branding and patrons with delicious flavor applicable across cuisine-types.  Made from 100% California vine-ripened tomatoes, Hunt’s Tomato Ketchup is the perfect complement for your favorite foods. We pride ourselves on offering ketchup that delivers a thick, rich formula with a sweet tomato profile.

Jazz up the flavor and body of your favorite sauces without adding extra liquid with Hunt's Tomato Paste. Simmered with salt and natural spices, Hunt's Tomato Paste is perfect in chili, soups, and stews. Add body to sauces with the extra-thick and rich texture, made using concentrated, strained tomatoes. No compromise, Hunt's Tomato Paste is 100% natural, with no artificial preservatives. Hunt's Tomato Paste adds a burst of rich tomato flavor to your recipes. Each can contains 12 oz of paste; 30 calories per serving; includes 24 cans. Hunt's tomatoes are picked at the peak of ripeness, because great tasting meals start with great ingredients.

description: Village Harvest® travels high into the Andes to harvest our quinoa. The Incas called quinoa “the mother of grain” and fed it to their warriors before battle. Now people refer to it as a “super grain” since it offers a healthy balance of essential amino acids. Each of these nicknames is slightly off. Quinoa is actually a seed – not a grain – from a plant related to spinach, beets, and Swiss chard. Call it what you will. We’ll just call it delicious. Fully cooked in about 10 minutes, it has a pleasant fluffy consistency and delicate, slightly nutty flavor.

product: DUKES Hickory Peach BBQ Smoked Shorty Sausages, 5oz
description: Duke's Hickory BBQ Smoked Shorty Sausages are a premium meat snack crafted with real, whole ingredients and flavorful smoked meats. These meat snacks are peach BBQ flavored and are smoked with 100% hickory wood to add a bold, rustic flavor that compliments the ripe sweetness of the peaches. What makes Duke’s dried meat snacks a cut above is Duke’s promise of using quality meats, real, whole ingredients, and creative ways to smoke meats. These delicious sausage snacks are made with freshly roasted peach BBQ relish, and fresh, never frozen pork raised with no hormones added to give you a snack where you can really taste the difference (federal regulations prohibit the use of hormones in pork). Each serving has 7 grams of protein. Not only are these delicious, spicy snack sticks made with real ingredients, but they are also gluten free and slow dried with no nitrites added (except for those naturally occurring in sea salt and celery powder). Duke's Hickory Peach BBQ Smoked Shorty Sausages are also keto friendly (7g of protein, 2g net carbs [3g total carbs minus 1g dietary fiber], and 1g added sugar per serving) and fit a low carb lifestyle (2g net carbs per serving [3g total carbs minus 1g dietary fiber]). Whether you’re looking for a premium, gluten free snack to enjoy during your work day, or are in need of the perfect road trip snack or something flavorful to enjoy in between meals, these dried sausage sticks are the perfect choice. Duke's Hickory Peach BBQ Smoked Shorty Sausages are packaged in a resealable bag that is easy to take with you anywhere. All of Duke’s smoked meat is made in small limited-size batch case quantities. Duke’s is on a mission to craft ridiculously flavorful smoked meats with the freshest tasting ingredients possible.

product: DUKES Hatch Green Chile Smoked Shorty Sausages, 5oz
description: Duke's Hatch Green Chile Smoked Shorty Sausages are a premium meat snack crafted with real, whole ingredients and flavorful smoked meats. These meat snacks are unforgettably smoky and sweet because of the valley's cooler climate. What makes Duke’s dried meat snacks a cut above is Duke’s promise of using quality meats, real, whole ingredients, and creative ways to smoke meats. These sweet, smoky sausage snacks are made with hatch green chiles, and fresh, never frozen pork raised with no hormones added to give you a snack where you can really taste the difference (federal regulations prohibit the use of hormones in pork). To make these green chile sausages, they roast their chiles, dice them thick, and let the natural chile oils infuse the sausages with their signature Hatch flavor. Each serving has 7 grams of protein. Not only are these delicious, spicy snack sticks made with real ingredients, but they are also gluten free and slow dried with no nitrites added (except for those naturally occurring in sea salt and celery powder). Duke's Hatch Green Chile Smoked Shorty Sausages are also keto friendly (7g of protein, 1g net carbs [1g total carbs minus 0g dietary fiber], and 0g added sugar per serving) and fit a low carb lifestyle (1g net carbs per serving [1g total carbs minus 0g dietary fiber]). Whether you’re looking for a premium, gluten free snack to enjoy during your work day, or are in need of the perfect road trip snack or something flavorful to enjoy in between meals, these dried sausage sticks are the perfect choice. Duke's Hatch Green Chile Smoked Shorty Sausages are packaged in a resealable bag that is easy to take with you anywhere. All of Duke’s smoked meat is made in small limited-size batch case quantities. Duke’s is on a mission to craft ridiculously flavorful smoked meats with the freshest tasting ingredients possible.

description: Village Harvest® travels high into the Andes to harvest our quinoa. The Incas called quinoa “the mother of grain” and fed it to their warriors before battle. Now people refer to it as a “super grain” since it offers a healthy balance of essential amino acids. Each of these nicknames is slightly off. Quinoa is actually a seed – not a grain – from a plant related to spinach, beets, and Swiss chard. Call it what you will. We’ll just call it delicious. Fully cooked in about 10 minutes, it has a pleasant fluffy consistency and delicate, slightly nutty flavor.

description: Village Harvest® travels high into the Andes to harvest our quinoa. The Incas called quinoa “the mother of grain” and fed it to their warriors before battle. Now people refer to it as a “super grain” since it offers a healthy balance of essential amino acids. Each of these nicknames is slightly off. Quinoa is actually a seed – not a grain – from a plant related to spinach, beets, and Swiss chard. Call it what you will. We’ll just call it delicious. Fully cooked in about 10 minutes, it has a pleasant fluffy consistency and delicate, slightly nutty flavor.

product: 6/6.35OZ ALESSI CACIO E PEPE QUICK 4 MINUTE PASTA
description: Leave it to the Italians to make a good thing even better! The pasta in this product is made to be enjoyed just like that, al dente, and has been specially made with very thin walls allowing it to cook much more rapidly than conventional types of pasta, taking about four minutes of cook time. Along with this uniquely designed pasta, we have added simple, high quality ingredients to create the famed dish, Cacio e Pepe. Hailing from the area of Rome and literally translated in dialect, this cheese (cacio) and pepper (pepe) mix well with our 100% durum wheat semolina quick cook pasta to create a blend of flavors inspired by Italy itself. Alessi Cacio e Pepe delivers a spoon full of flavor with every bite. The rich, creamy pasta serves well as a compliment to most meals, especially lamb, beef, pork or chicken.

Alessi Farro with Porcini Mushrooms begins with delicious, nutty flavored, whole grain farro. To the farro, we add highly prized, aromatic porcini mushrooms. With a quick twenty minute cooking time, this hearty dish satiates hunger pangs and offers a pleasing texture. Use as a side dish or as a base for a one bowl meal.

Leave it to the Italians to make a good thing even better! The pasta in this product is made to be enjoyed just like that, al dente, and has been specially made with very thin walls allowing it to cook much more rapidly than conventional types of pasta, taking about four minutes of cook time.  Along with this uniquely designed pasta, we have added delicious ingredients including broccolini and cheese to make a creamy Italian classic. The broccolini and cheese mix well with our 100% durum wheat semolina quick cook pasta to create a blend of flavors inspired by Italy itself. Alessi Broccolini e Formaggi delivers a spoon full of flavor with every bite. The rich, savory pasta serves well as a compliment to most meals, especially lamb, beef, pork or chicken.

product: RANCH STYLE Black Label Pinto Beans, 26oz
description: Authentic Southwestern cookin' begins with a 12-pack of RANCH STYLE Beans in 26-ounce cans. So for your next party or event, serve up plump pinto beans in a delicious blend of spices for unique, bold flavor. RANCH STYLE beans taste right at home in your Mexican-inspired recipes, such as tacos, nachos and chili, or heat them up quickly on the stove top or in the microwave to create a simple side dish for grilling steaks or burgers. With 5 grams of protein and 6 grams of fiber in every serving, pinto beans provide a hearty snack for your growling stomach. Try every tasty variety of RANCH STYLE chili beans, such as Jalapeño, Onion and Zesty Red Pepper. With flavor as big as Texas, you can experience that authentic Southwestern taste in every can of RANCH STYLE Seasoned Beans.
